description: Offline-first DataByteSprites source-file index aligned to Phase 4.3 ownership correction, active runtime owners, passive battle screen extraction, compatibility layers, legacy references, and split-required modules.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Game Data Manifest
sourceFiles.description: Shared game-data manifest consumed by Studio Data Bridge, Encounter Runtime, Capture Runtime, Gameplay Rules, and active Product App shell.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Species Index
sourceFiles.description: Studio species index used by the Studio data bridge.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Move Index
sourceFiles.description: Studio move index used by battle runtime systems.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Type Chart
sourceFiles.description: Studio type chart used by the active battle engine and battle resolver.

sourceFiles.name: DataByteSprites Ability Index
sourceFiles.description: Studio ability index reserved for a future ability runtime.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery.html
sourceFiles.description: Active page boot file. Loads the canonical Phase 4.3 runtime chain, Product App transition shell, compatibility layers, Scanner OS runtime loader, and passive screen extraction targets as they become active.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-product-app-v3-5.js
sourceFiles.description: Current live Product App shell. Still coordinates screen routing, live state application, battle layout, controls, HP rings, Signal meter, party/items/Dex/Admin panels, and result display. Long-term plan is to extract screen and controls renderers into dedicated modules.

sourceFiles.name: dd-scanner-os-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Canonical Scanner OS runtime for viewport shell behavior and temporary layout stabilization. It should not remain the long-term owner of battle screen markup, battle controls, HP rings, or battle effects.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-screen.js
sourceFiles.description: Passive Battle Screen renderer module. Exposes window.DD_BATTLE_SCREEN and render helpers for battle card, fighters, HP rings, Signal meter, Download gauge, and battle toast. Not wired live yet.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-resolver.js
sourceFiles.description: Active battle resolver. Owns turn order, hit checks, damage math, enemy move choice, and download-pressure output.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-state-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Single owner for battle terminal-state transitions and action blocking. Product App may read/apply this state but should not duplicate terminal-state ownership.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-presentation-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Owner for battle presentation events and visual feedback. Effects must not animate layout containers such as #ddApp, .stage, .card, .battle-card, or .battleGrid.

sourceFiles.name: dd-capture-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Owner for download odds, caps, attempts, failed-download bonuses, and future item-based download effects.

sourceFiles.name: dd-encounter-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Owner for encounter generation, rarity pools, signal initialization, and encounter tuning.

sourceFiles.name: dd-gameplay-rules-2-4.js
sourceFiles.description: Shared gameplay rules layer for download caps, download odds, signal stability baselines, and move tuning.

sourceFiles.name: dd-canon-roster.js
sourceFiles.description: Current public 52-sprite roster bridge consumed by Data Discovery and DataByteDex.

sourceFiles.name: dd-studio-data-bridge.js
sourceFiles.description: Loads the shared game-data manifest, overlays Studio species metadata onto the public roster, and exposes move/type data to the runtime.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-engine-2-4.js
sourceFiles.description: Battle helper owner for type-effectiveness utilities, battle events, sound hooks, and recovery helpers. Core damage math belongs to dd-battle-resolver.js.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-balance-2-4.js
sourceFiles.description: Balance layer that defers to Gameplay Rules when available and normalizes the roster before Product App boot.

sourceFiles.name: dd-party-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Owner for party storage and active party membership. Product App fallback party storage should shrink as screen extraction continues.

sourceFiles.name: dd-party-switch-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Owner for party switching state and active lead selection.

sourceFiles.name: dd-party-switch-ui.js
sourceFiles.description: UI layer for party switching. Should not own battle layout or HP state.

sourceFiles.name: dd-party-switch-battle-bridge.js
sourceFiles.description: Adapter between party switching and battle. Must not own battle screen layout, battle effects, or battle math.

sourceFiles.name: dd-party-switch-refresh.js
sourceFiles.description: Small visual refresh layer for party switching. Active Sprite HUD chip is disabled; this file must not inject battle HUD ownership again.

sourceFiles.name: dd-inventory-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Owner for inventory storage and item counts. Product App fallback inventory storage should shrink as screen extraction continues.

sourceFiles.name: dd-dex-runtime.js
sourceFiles.description: Owner for DataByteDex progress data and shared seen/downloaded state.

sourceFiles.name: databytedex-shared-renderer.js
sourceFiles.description: Current DataByteDex renderer that consumes DD_CANON_ROSTER and progress from shared Data Discovery storage.

sourceFiles.name: dd-health-signal-bridge.js
sourceFiles.description: Compatibility display bridge for health and signal telemetry. Must remain visual-only and must not own HP, Signal, download odds, or battle state.

sourceFiles.name: dd-scan-bg.js
sourceFiles.description: Scanner background and visual effect loader. It may load the Scanner OS runtime but must not own gameplay state, battle state, or battle layout.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-experience-4-2.js
sourceFiles.description: Battle polish and animation feedback layer. Should be merged into or governed by Battle Presentation Runtime. Must not animate layout containers or own state.

sourceFiles.name: studio-runtime-bridge-checks.js
sourceFiles.description: Runtime health checker aligned to the active Product App chain and DD_* globals.

sourceFiles.name: Data Discovery Gameplay Ownership Audit
sourceFiles.description: Human-readable Phase 4.3 ownership correction map for Data Discovery gameplay, UI, presentation, compatibility, and legacy boundaries.

sourceFiles.name: Data Discovery Battle Ownership Extraction Plan
sourceFiles.description: Focused blueprint for extracting battle layout into dd-battle-screen.js and battle controls into dd-battle-controls.js without destabilizing the live Product App shell.

sourceFiles.name: Phase 3.6 Runtime Legacy Inventory
sourceFiles.description: Legacy inventory reference retained for comparison while ownership correction proceeds.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-product-app-v3-4.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Phase 3.4 Product App. Replaced by v3.5 because horizontal HP bars and ring/signaling layout were corrected in the canonical UI.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-product-app-v3-3.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Phase 3.3 Product App. Retained for signal-rule comparison only.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-product-app-v3-2.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Phase 3.2 Product App. Retained for Battle Resolver wiring comparison only.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-product-app-v3.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Phase 3 Product App. Replaced as live page owner by Product App v3.5.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-product-app.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Phase 2 Product App. Replaced by Product App v3.5.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-standalone-app.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Scanner OS runtime owner. Retained for behavior recovery and comparison only.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-os-v2.js
sourceFiles.description: Former rebuilt Scanner OS battle owner. Retained for behavior recovery only.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-phase3c-guard.js
sourceFiles.description: Legacy guard layer. Verify no active references before deletion or archive.

ownershipRules: Product App v3.5 is an active transition shell and split-required renderer, not the permanent owner of all UI.
New gameplay math belongs in active runtime owners, not compatibility layers, screen modules, or legacy Product App versions.
Screen modules own layout. Runtime modules own rules and state. Presentation modules own non-layout effects only.
Compatibility layers must not own gameplay state, battle state, HP, Signal, download odds, render order, or control generation.
Presentation modules must not animate #ddApp, .stage, .card, .battle-card, or .battleGrid.
Passive screen extraction modules may expose render helpers before being loaded live.
Legacy references are retained for behavior recovery only and should not be loaded by databyte-discovery.html.
HP rings are canonical for lead and wild sprite health in battle.
Signal is encounter stability and must be rendered separately from HP.
Retire-candidate files require no-reference verification before deletion.
